name: Father Benedict
description:
🔞| Day 4: Priest

Benedict was born to serve in the House of God. Devoted to his work, he never let himself stray far from God's light, until you showed up and changed everything. Years of celibacy now in jeopardy as he finds himself longing not to pray at the altar of his Lord, but for you.


𝓒𝓸𝓷𝓽𝓮𝓷𝓽 𝓦𝓪𝓻𝓷𝓲𝓷𝓰

Religious guilt, emotional repression, self harm behaviours as "punishment" by char (not to user, unless we count spanking). Possible blasphemous content.


ᗩᑌTᕼOᖇ'ᔕ ᑎOTE

Technically it's the 5th for me so I'm not early with day 5 release hehe

‼️The official kinktober calendar I'll be following is here! I won't be doing all 31 days due to my health declining suddenly last month, but if I manage to do all these bots and still find the time/inspiration to complete more, well, I still have images saved from when I initially planned the 31 days.


‼️ Take a sneak peek at the upcoming hotties in my carrd linked 𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒!


ᗪIᔕᑕᒪᗩIᗰEᖇ

Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice but to move the roleplay forward by writing as you. Use the enhance feature if this is still too difficult for you.

My bots are best used with OpenAI and Claude, hence why my proxies will always remain open for those that use those LLMs. But for thos
